query: We've got a pile of MCP servers, some shared JSON schemas, and a growing folder of incident reports scattered across different repos — can you pull them into one place with a proper root CLAUDE.md?
My team's threat-hunting tooling is a mess — sigma rules in one place, the splunk connector in another, no shared schema. Set up a single repo that ties it all together.
Can you check whether our security tooling repo still matches the CLAUDE.md conventions we set up six months ago? Things have drifted and I don't trust it anymore.
I want to scaffold a new repo for our SOC automation stuff — a couple MCP servers, ECS/OCSF resource packs, and a docs folder for decision records.
Before I onboard a new hunter to this repo, can you verify the directory structure and naming still line up with what's documented, and fix anything that's a safe auto-fix?
we need one home for our yara-mcp and splunk-mcp servers plus the ioc schemas they share, can you wire that up from scratch
Is there any drift between what's actually in this project and what the root CLAUDE.md claims about it? Also flag it if secrets snuck into any config file.
spin up a fresh repo for our detection engineering work — sigma rules, a couple mcp servers for splunk and virustotal, a reports folder, the whole setup we usually do for these
our .env got committed to this repo at some point and I'm worried other stuff drifted too, can you scan it and tell me how bad each issue is

I keep hand-rolling the same directory layout for every new security-tooling project (mcp-servers, schemas, resources, reports, docs) — can you just generate it properly this time with the registry and CLAUDE.md and everything wired up
Set up npm workspaces so our frontend and backend packages can share a tsconfig and a single node_modules
We want to migrate our JS monorepo to Turborepo for build caching — can you wire up turbo.json and the pipeline config
Scaffold a new Python project with the standard src/ layout, a pyproject.toml, and pytest set up
Can you set up a Cargo workspace so these three Rust crates share a lockfile?
Our lerna config is outdated, can you help migrate it to pnpm workspaces instead
Review this PR for SQL injection risks in the new log ingestion endpoint before we merge it
Can you write unit tests for the parser module in schemas/parser.py, it's not covered at all right now
Help me debug why my MCP server keeps disconnecting from Claude Desktop after a couple minutes idle
Check this Dockerfile for security best practices before we ship the image
Split our giant Django app into multiple installable packages under a packages/ folder using Nx, keeping the current repo
